name: Gmail
description: Google's email service with 15GB free storage, smart filtering, integrated chat, and powerful search.

name: Google Passwords
description: View, manage, and audit passwords saved in your Google account across Chrome and Android devices.

name: Google Search Console
description: Monitor your website's performance in Google Search. Check indexing status, core web vitals, and fix coverage errors.

name: Google Translate
description: Instantly translate text, documents, and websites between 130+ languages using Google's neural machine translation.

name: Google Trends
description: Explore trending topics and compare keyword search interest over time. Useful for content ideas and market research.

name: Google Photos
description: Free photo and video backup with AI-powered search. Find any photo by typing what's in it — no manual tagging needed.

name: Google Keep
description: Simple note-taking app with checklists, voice memos, and colour labels. Syncs instantly across all your devices.

name: Google Forms
description: Free survey and form builder with instant response analytics. Great for quizzes, RSVPs, and data collection.

name: Google Earth
description: Explore a photorealistic 3D globe of the entire planet. Fly anywhere, view street-level imagery, and take guided tours.

name: Google Scholar
description: Search academic papers, theses, and citations across disciplines. The default starting point for serious research.

name: Google Maps
description: Navigation, transit times, and local business info worldwide. The most-used mapping service on the planet.

name: Google Docs
description: Free real-time collaborative word processor. Auto-saves to Drive and works seamlessly across any device.

name: Google Sheets
description: Free spreadsheet app with real-time collaboration and powerful formula support, fully compatible with Excel files.

name: Google Search
description: The world's most-used search engine. Instant answers, images, news, and the foundational tool of the internet.

name: Google One
description: Paid storage upgrade across Gmail, Photos, and Drive with extra perks like VPN and family sharing.
